channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: ‘We’ll be doing something with Cuba very soon’, Trump says
item.description: While waging war on Iran, the US president and his secretary of state are demanding a leadership change in Cuba.

item.title: Iran allowing more ships through Strait of Hormuz, data show
item.description: Number of ships transiting Strait of Hormuz has nearly doubled in recent days, maritime intelligence company says.

item.title: Over 200 Ukrainian military experts in Gulf region to counter Iran’s drones
item.description: Ukraine President Zelenskyy says Moscow, Tehran 'brothers in hatred'; claims Iran's drones 'contain Russian components'.

item.title: Who is Joe Kent, and why did he resign as Trump’s counterterrorism chief?
item.description: Kent is the highest-level official to leave Trump administration over the US president's decision to wage war on Iran.

item.title: Larijani’s warning to US, Israel before his killing
item.description: Ali Larijani, the late secretary of Iran’s SNSC, warned the US and Israeli that killing leaders would strengthen Iran.

item.title: Burning debris from missile interceptions showers Dubai
item.description: Witness videos captured missile interceptors launching and burning debris raining from the sky in Dubai.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran mourns Larijani, Soleimani; 2 killed in Israel
item.description: Iran launches attacks on Israel, killing two, as Bahrain, Qatar, UAE, and Saudi Arabia intercept more missiles, drones.

item.title: Israel killed Larijani hoping to ‘torpedo’ chance of US-Iran talks
item.description: Marwan Bishara says Israel’s assassination of Larijani is calculated to prolong the war and bring about regime change.

item.title: Pakistan ‘strongly’ rejects claim it struck Kabul hospital
item.description: Pakistan’s Minister for Information “strongly” rejects the claim Pakistan was behind an air strike on a Kabul hospital.

item.title: Ireland’s Micheal Martin and Trump in awkward St Patrick’s Day exchange
item.description: Ireland, which took strong stance on Gaza genocide, is similarly robust on Iran, but Martin is criticised for passivity.
